productName: Mad Mark disposable vape - mad gelato 1g
description: An all-in-one hybrid disposable vape preloaded with Mad Gelato oil — no battery to charge, no cart to screw on, just unbox, draw, and enjoy. Simple, smooth, portable, a sweet, creamy, dessert-like aroma with a balanced, euphoric feel, leading into an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
